file.string: CAMPUS VERIFIED • STUDENTS AND STAFF ONLY
A centralized platform for students and staff to report and recover lost items within the university campus.
Please log in first to view the item details.
Receipt / ID proof / Serial number details
e.g. What is inside the wallet? (Hidden field)
e.g. What is written inside the notebook?
I confirm that the above information is accurate and true.
I confirm that the information provided is true and the item was found within university premises.
Fast, secure, and verified campus network.
Join the network\nHelp others and recover your item
I agree to the Lost & Found policy and verification.
Sign in as a Student or Staff member to continue.
Join our campus community to help each other recover lost belongings quickly and safely.
Contact security office for urgent matters.
Describe specific marks, unique ID, or content only the owner knows
Information to be kept confidential (e.g., IMEI number, specific document ID)
I confirm that the information provided is accurate.
A question only the owner could answer (e.g., Lock screen wallpaper)
Your content goes here. This scrollable modal follows the premium university portal feel with rounded corners and soft shadows.
Designed with a clean SaaS dashboard look, ensuring consistency across all screens.
Try adjusting your search or filters

Passionate Android developer with a strong focus on creating clean, efficient, and user-centric mobile applications. Currently pursuing my degree in Computer Science and Engineering, I enjoy solving complex problems and staying updated with the latest mobile technologies. I am dedicated to building high-quality apps that provide great user experiences.
BSc Engineering in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE)
Bangladesh Army University of Science and Technology (BAUST), Saidpur

Welcome to the Campus Lost&Found Portal
We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our mobile application.

Please read this policy carefully. By accessing or using the app, you agree to the data practices described in this policy.
We collect several types of information to provide and improve our services.

When you register an account, we may collect:
• Full Name
• University ID
• Email Address
• Phone Number
• Department
• Batch
• Level / Term
• Section
• Gender
• Profile Picture

This information helps us create and manage your user account.

When reporting a lost or found item, we may collect:
• Item Name
• Item Category
• Item Description
• Lost/Found Location
• Date and Time
• Uploaded Item Images

This information helps other users identify and recover lost items.

For lost items, users may provide:
• Proof of ownership (images or descriptions)
• Confidential identification details

For found items, users may provide:
• Handling status
• Authority contact details
• Hidden verification questions

These measures help ensure the rightful owner receives the item.

Some technical data may be collected automatically, including:
• Device Type
• Operating System
• Unique Device Identifiers
• IP Address
• App Usage Statistics

This information helps us improve performance and fix issues.
If you contact us through the app or email, we may keep records of the communication for support purposes.

We use the collected information to:
• Provide, operate, and maintain the application
• Create and manage user accounts
• Allow users to report lost or found items
• Help connect users for item recovery
• Verify identities and prevent fraudulent activity
• Send important updates or notifications
• Improve app features and user experience
• Analyze usage trends
• Comply with legal requirements
We may share information in the following situations:

When you report a lost or found item, some information (such as item details and location) may be visible to other registered users to help identify and return items.\n\nSensitive information may be partially hidden until verification.

We may use third-party services to operate the app:

Firebase (Google)
Used for: Authentication, Realtime Database, Secure data storage

Supabase
Used for: Image storage (profile images and item photos)

These services process only the data necessary to operate the app.
If the app undergoes a merger, acquisition, or asset sale, user information may be transferred as part of the transaction.

We implement reasonable security measures to protect your data, including:
• Secure database systems
• Encrypted data transmission (HTTPS)
• Access control mechanisms

However, no system is completely secure. While we strive to protect your information, absolute security cannot be guaranteed.
You have several rights regarding your personal data.
You may view and update your profile information within the app at any time.
You may request account deletion by contacting us.\n\nCertain records may be retained if required for legal or administrative purposes.
You can opt out of non-essential communications such as promotional emails.
You may withdraw consent for data processing where applicable.

This application is designed for university students, faculty, and staff.\n\nWe do not knowingly collect data from children under 13 years old. If such information is discovered, it will be removed immediately.

We may update this Privacy Policy periodically.

When changes occur:
• The Effective Date will be updated
• The revised policy will be posted inside the app

Continued use of the app indicates acceptance of the updated policy.
If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:
Admin request sent to Admin for approval.
Please log in first to submit a found report.
Please log in first to submit a lost report.
No account exists with this University ID. Please register again.
Are you sure you want to delete this user permanently? This action cannot be undone.
Enter the University ID of the person who returned the item
%1$s has marked that they received ‘%2$s’ from you. Click to view details.

We may disclose your personal information in the good faith belief that such action is necessary to comply with a legal obligation, protect and defend our rights or property, or investigate wrongdoing in connection with the App.
Enter the University ID of the actual owner (who lost the item)
%1$s has marked that they returned ‘%2$s’ to you. Click to view details.
e.g. Fake lost item post, App not working
Your report has been submitted to admin
Search by ID, User or Item ID...
